description: Google Cloud IoT Core was a Google Cloud service for registering and managing IoT devices connected to Google Cloud. The domain `cloudiot.googleapis.com` is the API host used by that service's client libraries and REST interface.
summary: cloudiot.googleapis.com exposes one Google Cloud HTTP API surface, the Cloud IoT API, authenticated with Google Cloud credentials (ADC/OAuth-based service or user credentials); no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found for this domain.
